modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issue with stapling feature on multifunction copier

full_description_text:  
User is trying to utilize the stapling function on the copier. Encountering difficulties with the feature. The environment includes a USD-owned Windows computer and Papercut. Need clarification on how to properly access and use the stapling option.
short_description: Issue with stapling feature on multifunction copier
description: User is trying to utilize the stapling function on the copier. Encountering difficulties with the feature. The environment includes a USD-owned Windows computer and Papercut. Need clarification on how to properly access and use the stapling option.
